VO_EN: Because the person on that table didn't walk in.
VO_VI: Vi nguoi tren ban mo do khong tu buoc vao.

VO_EN: But the moment the scalpel touches skin - steady.
VO_VI: Nhung khi luoi dao cham da - vung.

VO_EN: The room smells like iodine and cold metal.
VO_VI: Phong ngat mui iodine va kim loai lanh.
Ban duoc dao tao cho dieu nay.

VO_EN: Nobody wakes up at twenty-two in medical school thinking - someday I'll cut people open in a basement.
VO_VI: Khong ai thuc day luc hai muoi hai tuoi trong truong y ma nghi - mot ngay nao do toi se mo nguoi trong tang ham.

VO_EN: And someone on that table who might not want to be there.
VO_VI: Va mot nguoi tren ban mo co le khong muon o day.

VO_EN: Four hours of sleep a night if you're lucky.
VO_VI: Bon tieng ngu moi dem neu may man.

VO_EN: You fall asleep in the library with your face on the textbook.
VO_VI: Ban ngu guc trong thu vien voi mat ap len sach giao khoa.

VO_EN: Wake up at four a.m. with ink on your cheek.
VO_VI: Tinh day luc bon gio sang voi vet muc tren ma.

VO_EN: You memorize every bone in the human body.
VO_VI: Ban thuoc long moi xuong trong co the nguoi.

VO_EN: Every nerve pathway that branches from the spine to the fingertips.
VO_VI: Moi duong dan than kinh tu cot song den dau ngon tay.

VO_EN: Your hands learn to cut with a precision most people can't imagine.
VO_VI: Tay ban hoc cach cat voi do chinh xac ma hau het moi nguoi khong tuong tuong noi.
Cuon sach giao khoa nang bon ky.
Ban mang no di khap noi.

VO_EN: Your roommate makes fun of you for it.
VO_VI: Ban cung phong cuoi ban vi chuyen do.
Chuyen do khong lam ban ban tam.

VO_EN: You practice sutures on chicken legs at midnight.
VO_VI: Ban tap khau tren dui ga luc nua dem.
Vi lam hong o day thi khong co tieng thet.

VO_EN: Over and over until your fingers can do it without your brain.
VO_VI: Lap di lap lai cho den khi ngon tay tu lam ma khong can dau oc.

VO_EN: You tape them and keep going.
VO_VI: Ban dan bang keo va tiep tuc.
Ca mo thuc su dau tien.

VO_EN: The attending surgeon watches from three feet away - you can feel his breath through the mask.
VO_VI: Bac si phu trach dung cach mot met - ban cam nhan duoc hoi tho cua ong ta qua khau trang.
Bac si phu trach gat dau.

VO_EN: When you close the wound and the patient wakes up - their family holds your hands.
VO_VI: Khi ban dong vet mo va benh nhan tinh day - gia dinh ho nam lay tay ban.

VO_EN: The ones that just saved someone.
VO_VI: Doi tay vua cuu mot mang nguoi.

VO_EN: Because you keep looking at your fingers in the dark.
VO_VI: Vi ban cu nhin nhung ngon tay minh trong bong toi.

VO_EN: Wondering what else they can do.
VO_VI: Tu hoi chung con lam duoc gi nua.

VO_EN: You call your mother that night.
VO_VI: Dem do ban goi cho me.

VO_EN: She asks how your day was.
VO_VI: Ba hoi hom nay the nao.

VO_EN: Seven years of tuition don't disappear because you've got a badge now.
VO_VI: Bay nam hoc phi khong bien mat chi vi ban co the bac si.
Vo ban di lam hai cho.

VO_EN: You moonlight at a second clinic on weekends.
VO_VI: Ban lam them o phong kham thu hai vao cuoi tuan.

VO_EN: Saturday mornings you drive forty minutes across town to stitch up walk-ins for eleven dollars an hour.
VO_VI: Sang thu bay ban lai xe bon muoi phut qua thanh pho de khau vet thuong cho benh nhan vang lai voi muoi mot do mot gio.

VO_EN: The dashboard light in your car has been on for three weeks.
VO_VI: Den bao tren taplo xe ban sang ba tuan roi.
Phep tinh khong bao gio ra.

VO_EN: You open the bills on the kitchen table every month.
VO_VI: Moi thang ban mo hoa don tren ban bep.

VO_EN: Same table where you eat dinner.
VO_VI: Cung cai ban ban an com toi.

VO_EN: Same table where you pretend the numbers don't keep you up.
VO_VI: Cung cai ban noi ban gia vo nhung con so khong lam ban mat ngu.

VO_EN: Your spouse stops asking about the numbers after a while.
VO_VI: Vo ban ngung hoi ve nhung con so sau mot thoi gian.

VO_EN: Put the bills in a drawer.
VO_VI: Cat hoa don vao ngan keo.

VO_EN: In the morning the bills are still in the drawer.
VO_VI: Sang hom sau hoa don van trong ngan keo.
Nhung ban la bac si phau thuat.

VO_EN: There's a framed certificate on the wall of your apartment.
VO_VI: Co tam bang duoc dong khung tren tuong can ho.

VO_EN: You look at it sometimes when you come home late - the glass has fingerprints on it from the last time you touched it.
VO_VI: Thinh thoang ban nhin no khi ve muon - kinh con dau van tay tu lan cuoi ban cham vao.

VO_EN: You took an oath - the oldest one in medicine.
VO_VI: Ban da tuyen the - loi the co nhat trong y khoa.
Truoc tien khong duoc gay hai.

VO_EN: Just a suitcase and a note on the kitchen table that says I can't do this anymore.
VO_VI: Chi co mot cai vali va manh giay tren ban bep ghi toi khong the tiep tuc duoc nua.

VO_EN: She left the key on the counter next to a glass she didn't wash.
VO_VI: Co ay de chia khoa tren ke ben canh coc nuoc chua rua.

VO_EN: The hospital cut your hours - not because you're bad, but because there aren't enough patients with insurance to justify a full surgical team.
VO_VI: Benh vien cat gio lam cua ban - khong phai vi ban kem, ma vi khong du benh nhan co bao hiem de duy tri ca ekip phau thuat.
Gio ban an toi mot minh.

VO_EN: You leave the other chair where it is.
VO_VI: Ban de cai ghe kia nguyen cho cu.

VO_EN: And then an old colleague from residency calls.
VO_VI: Roi mot dong nghiep cu thoi noi tru goi dien.
Anh ta co mot de nghi.

VO_EN: Converted from something else - you can still see the outline of shelves on the wall where they used to stock supplies.
VO_VI: Duoc nang cap tu cai gi do - ban van thay vet ke tren tuong noi ho tung chua do.

VO_EN: Kidney extraction from a living donor.
VO_VI: Lay than tu nguoi hien song.
Hai muoi nghin do moi ca.

VO_EN: More than you make in six months at the hospital.
VO_VI: Nhieu hon luong sau thang o benh vien.

VO_EN: You think you understand how this works.
VO_VI: Ban tuong ban hieu cach no van hanh.

VO_EN: The donor is willing, your colleague says.
VO_VI: Nguoi hien dong y, dong nghiep ban noi.

VO_EN: He says that word like it settles everything.
VO_VI: Anh ta noi tu do nhu the la xong.

VO_EN: A man from a village you've never heard of.
VO_VI: Mot nguoi dan ong tu mot ngoi lang ban chua bao gio nghe ten.

VO_EN: Hands that have done work yours haven't.
VO_VI: Doi tay da lam nhung viec tay ban chua tung lam.
Anh ta ky vao to giay.

VO_EN: You don't ask if he can read.
VO_VI: Ban khong hoi anh ta co biet doc khong.

VO_EN: The room smells like disinfectant and something else - rust, maybe.
VO_VI: Phong ngat mui khu trung va gi do - ri set, co le.

VO_EN: Or maybe that's just how all basements smell.
VO_VI: Hoac co le tang ham nao cung the.

VO_EN: There are two folding chairs against the wall and a box of surgical gloves on a card table.
VO_VI: Co hai cai ghe gap dua vao tuong va mot hop gang tay phau thuat tren ban giay.

VO_EN: You adjust the lamp and prep him.
VO_VI: Ban chinh den va chuan bi cho anh ta.
Ai do ho phia sau vach ngan.

VO_EN: On the drive home you stop at a gas station.
VO_VI: Tren duong ve ban dung o tram xang.
Ban mua mot ly ca phe.

VO_EN: You sit in the parking lot for twenty minutes.
VO_VI: Ban ngoi trong bai do xe hai muoi phut.

VO_EN: You think about the twenty thousand dollars.
VO_VI: Ban nghi ve hai muoi nghin do.

VO_EN: You tell yourself - the recipient will die without this kidney.
VO_VI: Ban tu nhu - nguoi nhan se chet neu khong co qua than nay.

VO_EN: One person gives up something they can live without and another person lives.
VO_VI: Mot nguoi cho di thu ho song thieu duoc va mot nguoi khac duoc song.
Ca hai deu dong y den day.

VO_EN: You look at them under the faucet for a long time.
VO_VI: Ban nhin chung duoi voi nuoc mot luc lau.
Nguoi hien thu hai tre hon.
Khong ai giai thich tai sao co ay di chan dat.

VO_EN: When you prep her arm for the IV - she flinches.
VO_VI: Khi ban chuan bi canh tay co ay de truyen - co ay giat minh.

VO_EN: You look at the IV line instead.
VO_VI: Ban nhin duong truyen thay vao do.

VO_EN: You try to remember her face later that night.
VO_VI: Dem do ban co nho lai khuon mat co ay.

VO_EN: The envelope comes three days later.
VO_VI: Phong bi den ba ngay sau.

VO_EN: You stop moonlighting at the hospital.
VO_VI: Ban ngung lam them o benh vien.

VO_EN: You stop going back at all.
VO_VI: Ban ngung quay lai hoan toan.

VO_EN: You throw away your hospital badge.
Then fish it out of the trash and put it in a drawer.
VO_VI: Roi vot lai tu thung rac va cat vao ngan keo.

VO_EN: A man in a dark suit starts showing up.
VO_VI: Mot nguoi dan ong mac comple den bat dau xuat hien.
Anh ta khong phai bac si.

VO_EN: He never looks at the donors.
VO_VI: Anh ta khong bao gio nhin nguoi hien.

VO_EN: You think about the oath sometimes.
VO_VI: Thinh thoang ban nghi ve loi the.

VO_EN: Just the feeling of saying them - standing in a room full of people who meant it.
VO_VI: Chi la cam giac khi doc chung - dung trong can phong day nhung nguoi that su tin.
Mot so nguoi hien den trong trang thai da bi me.
Mot so khong noi duoc tieng dia phuong.

VO_EN: One of them has bruises on both arms.
VO_VI: Mot nguoi bi bam tim ca hai canh tay.

VO_EN: There's a moment - between putting on the gloves and picking up the scalpel - where you could still walk away.
VO_VI: Co mot khoai khac - giua luc mang gang tay va cam dao mo - khi ban van con co the bo di.

VO_EN: Every time you tell yourself this is the last one.
VO_VI: Moi lan ban tu nhu day la lan cuoi.

VO_EN: Every time the envelope shows up the next week.
VO_VI: Moi lan phong bi xuat hien tuan sau.

VO_EN: You see them when you check the IV line.
VO_VI: Ban thay chung khi kiem tra duong truyen.

VO_EN: You look at your colleague across the room.
VO_VI: Ban nhin dong nghiep phia ben kia phong.

VO_EN: When the sedation starts to wear off - crying.
VO_VI: Khi thuoc me bat dau het tac dung - tieng khoc.

VO_EN: The kind where the body shakes.
VO_VI: Loai ma ca nguoi run len.

VO_EN: The man in the suit blocks the door.
VO_VI: Nguoi dan ong mac comple chan cua.

VO_EN: You know too much to leave.
VO_VI: Ban biet qua nhieu de co the roi di.
Hoac chung toi tim bac si khac.

VO_EN: The light above the table buzzes.
VO_VI: Den tren ban mo keu vo vo.

VO_EN: Of all the things happening in this room - you notice the buzzing.
VO_VI: Trong tat ca nhung gi dang xay ra trong phong nay - ban chu y tieng vo vo.

VO_EN: Something in your chest skips - not pain, not panic - just a skip.
VO_VI: Gi do trong nguc ban nhay mot nhip - khong dau, khong hoang - chi la mot nhip nhay.

VO_EN: The body knows what to do.
VO_VI: Co the biet phai lam gi.

VO_EN: Even when the mind is screaming.
VO_VI: Ke ca khi dau oc dang gao thet.

VO_EN: You're standing in front of it.
You learned this in your first year of residency.
VO_VI: Ban hoc dieu nay tu nam dau noi tru.

VO_EN: Back when washing your hands meant you were done helping someone.
VO_VI: Hoi do rua tay co nghia la ban vua giup xong mot nguoi.

VO_EN: You stop looking at their faces.
You stop looking at your own face in the mirror.
VO_VI: Ban ngung nhin mat minh trong guong.

VO_EN: You try to remember the name of your first patient - the appendectomy.
VO_VI: Ban co nho ten benh nhan dau tien - ca cat ruot thua.

VO_EN: The family that held your hands - their faces are gone too.
VO_VI: Gia dinh tung nam tay ban - khuon mat ho cung mat luon.
Khong benh vien nao nhan ban.

VO_EN: Your license expired three years ago.
VO_VI: Bang hanh nghe het han ba nam truoc.

VO_EN: The only people who need your hands are in this building.
VO_VI: Nhung nguoi duy nhat con can tay ban la nhung nguoi trong toa nha nay.

VO_EN: You eat lunch in the break room.
VO_VI: Ban an trua trong phong nghi.

VO_EN: There's a calendar on the wall.
It's been on March for five months.
VO_VI: No dung o thang Ba da nam thang.

VO_EN: Someone put a bucket under it months ago.
VO_VI: Ai do dat xo hung nuoc tu may thang truoc.
Ban nghi den viec goi cho ai do.

VO_EN: You pick up the phone and put it back down.
VO_VI: Ban cam dien thoai len roi dat xuong.

VO_EN: Everything blurs for a second - the lights, the walls, the hum of the vent above the ceiling.
VO_VI: Moi thu mo di mot giay - den, tuong, tieng u u cua quat tran.

VO_EN: Put it back where it was.
You drive home the same way every night.
VO_VI: Moi toi ban lai xe ve cung mot duong.

VO_EN: Every morning you look at your hands.
VO_VI: Moi sang ban nhin tay minh.

VO_EN: Same hands that held a patient's family.
VO_VI: Cung doi tay tung nam tay gia dinh benh nhan.

VO_EN: Same hands that closed a wound and heard thank you.
VO_VI: Cung doi tay tung dong vet mo va nghe tieng cam on.

VO_EN: Everything your hands know is still there.
VO_VI: Moi thu tay ban biet van con do.

VO_EN: But the moment the scalpel touches skin - steady.
VO_VI: Nhung khi luoi dao cham da - vung.

VO_EN: The oath is still there - carved into your memory like scar tissue.
VO_VI: Loi the van con do - khac vao tri nho nhu mo seo.
Truoc tien khong duoc gay hai.
